english_text: I run five kilometers a day
My personal best is three hours
The Han River trail is great
Running in the park is relaxing
The Seoul Marathon is in March
I alternate running and rest days
I carry a water bottle when running
I eat energy gels during marathons
I want to improve my time
I love the feeling after a run
Bib number pick up is tomorrow
I got a medal for finishing
Keep running and never give up
Listen to your body while running
See you at the finish line
Today I ran my best time

romanization: dalligineun jayuyeyoThe finish line is just the beginning
